title: Morals
writer: Julia Crawford Ivers, William J. Locke
actors: May McAvoy, William P. Carleton, Marian Skinner
plot: Carlotta, raised in a Turkish harem and threatened with marriage to a man she does not love, escapes to London with an English adventurer. When he is killed, she is left destitute and attaches herself to Sir Marcus Ordeyne and beg...
